eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.6 to 3.2.3 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern development.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2 requires Java 17 minimum, but the project intends to run on Java 21; keeping 17 would prevent using Java 21 features or might cause runtime mismatches if the target environment is strictly 21.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Kotlin version from 1.7.20 to 1.9.23 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.2 and Java 21.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Kotlin versions may have compatibility issues with the newer Spring Boot 3.2 dependencies and Java 21 bytecode.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Kotlin compiler JVM target from 11 to 17 to align with the new Java version and Spring Boot requirements.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling Kotlin code for JVM 11 is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x which requires JVM 17+ bytecode.

eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Add thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity6 dependency to support Spring Security 6 integration with Thymeleaf.
eDrops/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Spring Security 6, which requires the specific 'springsecurity6' extra for Thymeleaf dialects; the old 'springsecurity5' or implicit versions will fail at runtime.
